query:
UPDATE providers SET
             service_name = $1,
             service_description = $2,
             category = $3,
             location = $4,
             phone_number = $5,
             email = $6,
             website = $7,
             whatsapp = $8,
             profile_photo = COALESCE($9, profile_photo),
             onboarding_completed = TRUE
         WHERE user_id = $10 RETURNING id
